fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"

  echo "i3 is down"

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"

  echo "i3 is down"

}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"

  echo "i3 is down"

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"

  echo "i3 is down"

}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"

  echo "i3 is down"

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"

  echo "i3 is down"

}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"

  echo "i3 is down"

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"

  echo "i3 is down"

}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"

  echo "i3 is down"

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"

  echo "i3 is down"

}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"

  echo "i3 is down"

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"

  echo "i3 is down"

}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"

  echo "i3 is down"

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"

  echo "i3 is down"

}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

  echo "i3 is running"

  echo "i3 is down"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

function update_system() {
  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu
}

function extract() {
  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1
  else
    echo "File not found"
  fi
}

if [ -d "/etc/pacman.d" ]; then
  echo "Arch Linux detected"
fi

if systemctl is-active --quiet i3; then
  echo "i3 is running"
else
  echo "i3 is down"
fi

for file in *.txt; do
  cat "$file" | grep "error"
done

while read -r line; do
  echo "Processing: $line"
done < input.log

sudo pacman -Syu --noconfirm

pacman -Qdtq | sudo pacman -Rs -

sudo pacman -S --needed base-devel git

ps aux | awk '{print $1, $2, $11}' | grep "python"

cat /var/log/syslog | grep "CRON" | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'

find . -type f -name "*.py" -exec grep -Hn "import" {} \;

  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu

  echo "Updating Arch..."
  sudo pacman -Syu

  if [ -f $1 ] ; then
    tar xzvf $1

  fi
